examples: Environmental pressures are strengthening the case for waterborne freight.
Officials say another major concern is the spread of waterborne diseases.
Waterborne diseases continue to kill more than two million people per year.
Nomadics has already devised a waterborne offshoot of Fido called Seapup, a self-propelled minisub.
Gosnell mainly uses his waterborne dragster to take friends out for day sails around Nantucket Island.
